title: Crystal Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Diamondhead's Crystal Levitation attack which he used to defeat Vilgax.gif|thumb|420px|[[Diamondhead]] using crystal manipulation against [[Vilgax]].]]

==Summary==
The power to '''manipulate crystals and gemstones'''. User can create, shape and manipulate crystalline structures such as rubies, glass, and diamonds, and many characters can use them as a source of energy and magic as well.

==Possible Uses==
*Create weapons made of gemstones
*Fire gemstone projectiles
*Transmute opponents into Crystal
*Use gemstones as a method of channeling energy

*Create sentient beings out of crystal
*Coat oneself in crystal to defend against attacks
*Seal opponents in Crystal to trap them

==Limitations==
*May be unable to create crystal, being limited to manipulating only from already existing sources.
*Distance, mass, precision, etc. depend upon of the knowledge, skill, and strength of the user.
*May not be able to manipulate a more broad "Earth", such as stone and rock.
*Crystals can be broken and overloaded with energy, if that is their purpose.

==Users==
*[[The Knight (Hollow Knight)|The Knight]] ([[Hollow Knight (Verse)|Hollow Knight]]), through Crystal Dash
* [[Guren]] ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]]), through Crystal Release
* [[Rin Tohsaka]] and [[Luviagelita Edelfelt|Luvia Edelfelt]], through Jewel Magic 
* [[Sableye]], [[Diancie]], and other [[Pokémon]] 
* Earthbenders ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender]]) 
* [[Diamondhead]] ([[Ben 10 (Classic)|Ben 10]])
* [[Immortality|Ganondorf]] ([[The Legend of Zelda]]) 
* [[Mega Man (Classic)]] through Crystal Man and Jewel Man's weapons 
* [[SpaceGodzilla (Heisei)|Spacegodzilla]]
*[[Noriaki Kakyoin]] ([[JoJo's Bizarre Adventure]]), with Emerald Splash

==Note==
Although the page title refers to crystals, for practical reasons, manipulation of gems is also included as a part of this ability.
